summary: The video captures nighttime driving conditions with streetlights illuminating the road. A white sedan approaches from the right side of the frame and passes by closely beside the ego-vehicle, creating a brief moment of proximity.

events_timeline.event: A white sedan approaches from the right side of the frame and passes by closely beside the ego-vehicle, creating a brief moment of proximity.

uncertainties: The weather condition is unclear due to the lack of visible precipitation or wet surfaces.
